revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Minamihachimanguu
Bot: Reset placeholder for wiki page generation
revision.text: PLACEHOLDER SHIKINAISHA PAGE [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Minamihachimanguu
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Minamihachimanguu | native_name = 南八幡宮 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Minamihachimanguu | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Minamihachimanguu'''|南八幡宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|gōshi|ja|合祀|WD=Q11412524}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918}}
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Kamutano Shrine|WD=Q135041107}}
== street address (P6375) ==
* {'text': '島根県大田市久手町波根西', 'language': 'ja'}
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:gōshi]] [[Category:Shikinai Successor]]
{{wikidata link|Q135070140}}

revision.comment: v25: Add References section before category
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Minamihachimanguu | native_name = 南八幡宮 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Minamihachimanguu | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Minamihachimanguu'''|南八幡宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|gōshi|lt=gōshi|ja|合祀|WD=Q11412524}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|lt=Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918}}
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Kamutano Shrine|lt=Kamutano Shrine|WD=Q135041107}}
== street address (P6375) ==
* {'text': '島根県大田市久手町波根西', 'language': 'ja'}

revision.text:

{{nihongo|'''Minamihachimanguu'''|南八幡宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|gōshi|lt=gōshi|ja|合祀|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|lt=Shikinai Successor|qid=Q135022918|1=Shikinai Successor}}
